title: Board Permissions: Privileges & Accessibility
excerpt: The standard Board Permissions seem too black & white, when there may need to be some consideration for additional privileges, or even things that admins can control versus standard users/members. For example, the “Edit …

posts.author: akm (angelica kemper)
posts.cookedHtml: The standard Board Permissions seem too black & white, when there may need to be some consideration for additional privileges, or even things that admins can control versus standard users/members. For example, the “Edit content” permission level should not be allowed to Archive or Delete Boards, and they should not be allowed to change Item Terminology - these functions should only be available to Admins or Board Owners.

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @akm there is a similar post here: New Feature Request for Board Permissions that could use with some more votes. I recommend going over there and consolidating the feedback for easier triage and prioritization on monday.com team

Best!

posts.author: akm (angelica kemper)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks - I added my response, as suggested above; but do not have the ability to delete this post.
